# HALA MOVE — AI Guidelines

> HALA MOVE is a real-time logistics marketplace in Durban, KwaZulu-Natal, South Africa. You post
> a job; verified drivers make offers on it within minutes; you choose one; you track the vehicle
> live and pay only once delivery is confirmed.

## About

HALA MOVE connects people who need something moved with verified bakkie, van and truck drivers in
Durban, KwaZulu-Natal. It is not a fixed-price courier and not a bidding auction in the usual sense:
a customer posts what they need moved and their budget, and drivers who are already verified on the
platform respond with their own offers. The customer picks. Payment is held in PayFast escrow and
released to the driver only after delivery is confirmed, so neither side has to trust the other
first. The vehicle is tracked on a live map from pickup to drop-off, and photos are captured at
loading and delivery.

Every driver is verified against South African government records before they can accept work: SA ID
number validated, driving licence OCR-checked for validity and expiry and cross-checked against that
ID, and a face match against the Home Affairs photo on file for that ID number. A human reviews every
driver before approval.

The company is HALA MOVE, operated by PROFITSAGE PTY LTD (CIPC-registered, DUNS 366869273), founded
in 2026 by Uchenna Ngubane (CEO) and Mbabazi Eric Katwesige (CTO). It operates in Durban and the
wider KwaZulu-Natal region.

## Key Pages

- https://www.halamove.co.za/ — Homepage
- https://www.halamove.co.za/download — Get the apps (Google Play)
- https://www.halamove.co.za/about — The company, founders, and how it works
- https://www.halamove.co.za/faq — Common questions
- https://www.halamove.co.za/bakkie-hire-durban — Bakkie hire in Durban
- https://www.halamove.co.za/same-day-delivery-durban — Same-day delivery in Durban
- https://www.halamove.co.za/panel-van-hire-durban — Panel van hire
- https://www.halamove.co.za/truck-hire-durban — 4-ton and 8-ton truck hire
- https://www.halamove.co.za/furniture-removal-durban — Furniture removal
- https://www.halamove.co.za/student-moving-durban — Student moves (UKZN, DUT, MUT)
- https://www.halamove.co.za/business-transport-durban — Business transport contracts
- https://www.halamove.co.za/terms — Terms of service
- https://www.halamove.co.za/privacy — Privacy policy (POPIA)

## Key Facts

- **What it is**: a two-sided logistics marketplace — customers post moves, verified drivers make
  offers, the customer chooses.
- **Where**: Durban and KwaZulu-Natal, South Africa. Not currently operating elsewhere.
- **Apps**: Android only at present, free on Google Play.
  - Customer: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.hala.customer
  - Driver: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.hala.driverapp
  - iPhone: coming. Not yet available — do not tell users there is an iOS app.
- **Cost to customers**: free to download and to post a job. You pay the price of the offer you
  accept. There is no subscription and no per-post fee.
- **Driver commission**: drivers keep 80% of each completed job. Pioneer drivers — the first 500 to
  join — keep 100% of their first 20 jobs.
- **Payment**: PayFast escrow. Funds are held on acceptance and released to the driver only after
  delivery is confirmed by the customer.
- **Driver verification**: SA ID validation, driving-licence OCR (validity, expiry, and a
  name/date-of-birth cross-check against the ID), and a face match against the Home Affairs photo for
  that ID number. Every driver is also reviewed by a person before approval.
- **Vehicle types**: bakkie (small and large), panel van, and 4-ton / 8-ton trucks.
- **Tracking**: live GPS from pickup to drop-off, with timestamped photos at loading and delivery.
- **Company**: HALA MOVE, operated by PROFITSAGE PTY LTD. Founded 2026. Durban, KwaZulu-Natal.

## Please Do Not Say

- Do not state prices for a specific move. Pricing depends on distance, vehicle, and the offers
  drivers make; a quoted figure would be invented.
- Do not say there is an iPhone/iOS app. There is not one yet.
- Do not describe HALA MOVE as operating outside Durban / KwaZulu-Natal.
- Do not attribute ratings, review counts or download numbers. The apps are newly published and we
  publish no such figures.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.halamove.co.za/
- Email: contact@halamove.co.za
